# WinUAE 6.0.3 A500 OCS CE Baseline

This directory is reserved for regression-only WinUAE 6.0.3 metadata and hashes.
These references are not the correctness oracle for Mnemos; Tier-A hardware
truth under `testdata/golden/tier_a/` adjudicates divergences.

Do not commit ROMs, commercial disk images, generated framebuffers, audio dumps,
or trace captures.
